title: Teen (17) murdered in Asla Park
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 17-year-old Hagan Brits,...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 17-year-old *Hagan Brits, was fatally stabbed in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, in the early hours of Sunday morning, 24 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A 17-year-old *Hagan Brits, was fatally stabbed in Asla Park, KwaNonqaba, in the early hours of Sunday morning, 24 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said Hagan was reportedly stabbed in the upper thigh in Gubayo Street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was rushed to the Mossel Bay Provincial Hospital where he was later declared dead, just after 02:00.","html":"He was rushed to the Mossel Bay Provincial Hospital where he was later declared dead, just after 02:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said no arrests have been made at this stage. Should anyone have any information regarding the incident, contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Geoffrey Moos, on 044 606 5629.","html":"Kapp said no arrests have been made at this stage. Should anyone have any information regarding the incident, contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Geoffrey Moos, on 044 606 5629."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"*This article has been amended. It stated Hagan was a learner at Sao Bras Secondary School. It has since been confirmed that Hagan was deregistered as a learner from the school in 2023.","html":"*This article has been amended. It stated Hagan was a learner at Sao Bras Secondary School. It has since been confirmed that Hagan was deregistered as a learner from the school in 2023."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
